tests.description: Verifies that uploading a BDD feature file and generating documentation produces a well-formed JSON output containing named tests, descriptions, and coverage details.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user sees generated documentation after submitting a BDD file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or missing values exist in the downloaded output
At least one test entry is produced from the uploaded file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each test in the output is identifiable by name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty description
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output includes a human-readable description for the first test

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Coverage details are populated for the first test

tests.test_name: BDD - PO - data-driven produces multiple tests
tests.description: Verifies that uploading a data-driven BDD feature file generates a separate test entry for each data row, resulting in multiple documented tests.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user sees generated documentation after submitting a data-driven BDD file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or missing values exist in the downloaded output
Multiple test entries are produced, reflecting the parameterised nature of the file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each generated test entry is identifiable by name

tests.test_name: Panel title is "Documentation" when no add-ons are selected
tests.description: Verifies that the output panel displays the title 'Documentation' rather than an extended title when no additional analysis options are selected.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user sees output after submitting a BDD file with no add-ons

test_coverage.verification_step: Panel title is not 'Documentation and Analysis'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The panel heading accurately reflects that only documentation — not analysis — was requested

tests.description: Verifies that a QA Manager uploading a BDD feature file receives documentation that includes a correctly structured coverage matrix for each test.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user sees generated documentation after submitting the file
The output references the uploaded file by name, confirming the correct file was processed

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: No placeholder or missing values exist in the downloaded output

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A coverage matrix is present and populated for the first test

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for BDD
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each row in the matrix conforms to the expected structure for BDD-format files
